# truenas_system_info (Data Source)

Provides system information from TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_system_info" "current" {}

output "version" {
  value = data.truenas_system_info.current.version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `cores` (Number) Number of CPU cores.
- `hostname` (String) The system hostname.
- `loadavg_1` (Number) 1-minute load average.
- `loadavg_15` (Number) 15-minute load average.
- `loadavg_5` (Number) 5-minute load average.
- `model` (String) CPU model.
- `physical_memory` (Number) Physical memory in bytes.
- `system_product` (String) System product name.
- `system_serial` (String) System serial number.
- `timezone` (String) System timezone.
- `uptime` (String) System uptime as a human-readable string.
- `uptime_seconds` (Number) System uptime in seconds.
- `version` (String) The TrueNAS version string.
